# wrinkleFE runtime dependencies
# Generated by scanning every `import` / `from X import` statement under
# src/wrinklefe/ and scripts/, then resolving to currently installed versions.
# stdlib modules and local development tools (pytest, ruff, mypy, pytest-cov)
# are excluded by design.

# --- Core (numerical + plotting; required for CLI and headless analysis) ---
numpy==2.4.4
scipy==1.17.1
matplotlib==3.10.9

# --- GUI (only imported by src/wrinklefe/gui/*; required for `wrinklefe-gui`) ---
# Not installed in the current environment, so pinned to the project's declared
# lower bound from pyproject.toml. Update the floor once a known-good version
# is installed and verified.
PyQt6>=6.5
